title: Low-Cost Chlorophyll Fluorescence Imaging for Stress Detection.
author: Legendre R Basinger NT van Iersel MW
content: S-EPMC7999708 PMC7999708 Low-Cost Chlorophyll Fluorescence Imaging for Stress Detection. Plants naturally contain high levels of the stress-responsive fluorophore chlorophyll. Chlorophyll fluorescence imaging (CFI) is a powerful tool to measure photosynthetic efficiency in plants and provides
